posts.content: We had SO MUCH FUN!! I'm curious to see what this will sound like as a pod ep.

But wait there's more! Fresh off our live show in Brooklyn, @alexhanna.bsky.social and I will be doing the next MAIHT3K livestream on Monday May 4. We will be witnessing with dismay Bernie's descent into x-risk-ism.

Monday, May 4, noon PT
twitch.tv/dair_institute

More MAITH3k coming right up! 

@alexhanna.bsky.social and I are delighted to be talking with @nathaliemarechal.net on our next live stream, in which we will witness with dismay Bernie's descent into doomerism.

Monday, May 4, noon PT
twitch.tv/dair_institute
Watch this short, powerful, very on-point speech. Literal shivers watching @mjcrockett.bsky.social make the most of their platform!
Wesleyan Tetris

I'm a little late to the dunk-on-Dawkins party (but hey, let's keep the celebration rolling!) but I finally read his essay (minus the chatbot outputs he included) and I'm curious how much exposure it took for him to cook his brain so thoroughly. 

>>
Join us tomorrow!
Today!
Go home, LinkedIn. You're drunk.

@alexhanna.bsky.social and I are so excited to announce that THE AI CON has been selected as Book in Common for 2026-27 at Cal State Chico!

We're excited for thousands of folks to read and engage with our work. We'll be visiting campus on April 7, 2027 for a public event.

Seattle friends! This event on May 17, with Shelley Fairweather-Vega at Folio: The Seattle Athenaeum should be really fun. Join us!

www.folioseattle.org/event-detail...

Seattle friends -- two showings of @ghostdoc2026.bsky.social at SIFF on Sunday and Monday! 

And I'll be part of the post-screening Q&A :)

www.thestranger.com/arts/the-sif...

Tip for dealing with busy people: If you're asking someone to speak (esp. for free) at some event, AND you expect them to spend some time on a meeting beforehand to plan how it will go, put this in the initial invitation. 

Demanding extra time after someone has already agreed is rude, honestly.

“‘AI’ might not be good for xyz, but you can’t deny that it’s helpful for programming” -- sound familiar? On the next Mystery AI Hype Theater 3000 @alexhanna.bsky.social and I will be digging into that bullshit. Join us for the livestream: 

Monday, May 11, noon PT
twitch.tv/dair_institute

I guess I'm glad this is out there, but also I am infuriated that people have to spend their time doing this. OF COURSE synthetic text extruding machines are going to output something that *looks like* but is not an analysis. 

>>

I can't think of anything that makes me want to read a paper less than encountering "Recent advances in AI/LLMs" in the abstract/intro.

You can step off that bandwagon. Life is better over here!
Tomorrow!
This was really great! Also showing tomorrow at SIFF (though not IMAX).
Join us today!
I cosign all of this

People who are concerned about the good of humanity are always kissing up THIS HARD to fascists like Trump, right? Right???

(Also, Bernie bros, please get your guy.)

Missed Ghost in the Machine at SIFF? You can catch it via Kinema!

And, through tomorrow, participate in a fundraiser for @dairinstitute.bsky.social while you're at it!

notaidoc.com/dairxghost

Some reflections on frequently unasked questions about stochastic parrots (the phrase and the paper):

medium.com/@emilymenonb...
Timeline cleanse!

So "don't feed the trolls" usually means "don't feed the trolls content to keep them going" but sometimes I think it maybe also means "don't feed the trolls to one's followers" (by e.g. boosting a particularly bad take for others to see).

"Predictably, the huge spike in productivity that these companies claim their own AI products have enabled hasn’t resulted in more or better products, shorter work weeks, or better consumer experiences."

www.404media.co/software-dev...

Hey it's the book's birthday! 

Happy 1st Birthday to our book @alexhanna.bsky.social :) 

The AI Con has been out in the world for a whole year. 

🎂🎂🎂

thecon.ai
Always worth remembering: ChatGPT isn't a tool, it isn't a companion. It's a product -- and everything you type in that box is data you are sending to OpenAI.

Also available as video on PeerTube:
peertube.dair-institute.org/w/iccQCfUvfr...

Mystery AI Hype Theater 3000 Episode 77

Y’all won’t stop producing Fresh AI Hell, so @alexhanna.bsky.social and I had to try to make another pass at clearing it out!

www.buzzsprout.com/2126417/epis...

Seattle-area friends: See you Sunday?

www.pikeplacemarket.org/events-calen...

This is beautiful on so many levels. It names clearly and directly one of the insidious tactics that tech uses to evade effective regulation. It exemplifies a way in which humanistic scholarship provides critically important insight. >>

link.springer.com/article/10.1...

The kids are alright. 

Quite on top of everything else, what kind of bozo makes a graduation speech that isn't actually about the graduates?

Absolutely horrified at this planned study from my own institution:

www.404media.co/researchers-...

>>

Wow some terrible reporting about Google's latest horrible ideas about how to distort information access in the name of "convenience" (or something):

techcrunch.com/2026/05/19/g...

A short thread
🧵>>
We gotta find the guy that did this!!

Me: Why is there an exceptionally high density of Google bullshit in the news this week?

Me: Oh, it must be Google IO.

*sigh*

I appreciate this op-ed by my UW colleague Tomas Rocha in the Seattle Times today, calling out our state office of public education for its weak sauce "AI" policy.

www.seattletimes.com/opinion/wa-s...

>>

We had SO MUCH FUN doing our live taping in Brooklyn, and now you all can listen in, too, to me and @alexhanna.bsky.social -- I mean Al Sloppy Wood doing ridicule as praxis together with a wonderful live audience.

www.buzzsprout.com/2126417/epis...

I don't use the synthetic text extruding machines in any part of my writing process because I want what I write to be my words, arranged how I say them. 

Also, I can't stand to look at the crap that comes out of those things. Why would I subject myself to that?

How should we handle it when the AI bubble bursts? On the next MAIHT3k livestream, @matthewus.bsky.social joins me and @alexhanna.bsky.social to discuss how we can avoid bailing out billionaires.

Monday, June 1, noon PT
twitch.tv/dair_institute
